nasb.text: But she had brought them up to the roof and hidden them in the stalks of flax which she had laid in order on the roof.

esv.text: But she had brought them up to the roof and hid them with the stalks of flax that she had laid in order on the roof.

cnv.text: 其實她領他們上了屋頂，把他們藏在堆放在屋頂的麻稭裡面。

ccb.text: 其实喇合已经把二人带到屋顶上，藏在那里的麻秆堆里了。
